description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage that defines two jobs: rust-latest and rust-nightly. Use the rust:latest Docker image for the rust-latest job and the rustlang/rust:nightly image for the rust-nightly job, marking rust-nightly as allow_failure. In each job run the commands cargo build --verbose followed by cargo test --all --verbose. Do not configure any caches, artifacts, or special rules, and do not add deployment targets.
